params.name: Boating Party Lunch
params.description:
On Aug 1, 1881 AD, Renoir recorded the inspiration he received during the gathering and created this oil painting.
It is the last painting of the French painter Renoir during the Impressionist period. Through his skilled use of light, shadow, and color, he vividly depicted the scene of a gathering on the canvas, and combined with his bright and sweet painting style, this work gives people a dreamy and beautiful feeling. The unique technique of combining light, color, and emotion in the painti …
